title: Powah! ReFabric
description: Fabric version of 1.21.1 Powah - A tech mod that adds various ways to generate, store and transmit Energy.
body:
# Powah! Rearchitected ReFabric
Pull requests are greatly appreciated. A tech mod that has Various ways to generate, store and transmit Energy, for Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric. We do not plan to deviate from the original mod and or rearchitected. Powah! was originally created by owmii for Forge 1.14-1.16, and is was being maintained by Technici4n for Forge and Fabric since 1.18, but dropped support for Fabric in 1.21, which was then ported by AlphaMode from the 1.20.1 branch. This is allowed by the LGPL license used by Powah!. This is not endorsed by Technici4n. Credits
Thanks to owmii for creating [Powah](https://modrinth.com/project/KZO4S4DO), and releasing it under an open source license.
Thanks to Cyn for the new textures!
Thanks to Technici4n and other contributors!
